General Website Installation Troubleshooting Wordpress Installation Troubleshooting Get to know Consolto Features Consolto product tour Setup Ooni ai assistant Overview Tab Privacy features Your direct ClickNTalk Page Video calls Group Meetings Screen sharing Live Chat Manage chats/ calls in Consolto chat center Appointment scheduling Active engager - Give remote an in-store feeling File sharing 3D-Sense Get paid for your video chat sessions Contact form Whatsapp and Facebook Messenger Phone number Customizations Dynamic Forms Customize widget appearance Setting up the features and texts Automatic Messages and texts Choose action when you are not available Multi agent Single Agent VS Multi Agent Multi Agent Settings Setup your agents' widget and ClickNTalk page Team conversation features Integrations Zapier integration Webhooks Connecting SMTP Email to Consolto Paypal Web Frontend API Google analytics events Google Calendar Integration Advanced Installation Page Matches Use CNAME for your ClickNTalk page Using Website Custom Buttons Direct Action Links - Widget Direct Action Links - ClickNTalk Page Sending user-data from ClickNTalk link Sending user-data from website to widget Triggering the Consolto widget programatically Availability Cues on website elements Fetching agent availability programatically Listening to widget events Embed your ClickNTalk page as an iframe Installing with AMP support Webhooks CONTENTS Table of content Consolto Webhooks: Real-Time Events at Your Fingertips Consolto makes it easy to stay in sync with everything happening in your conversations, calls, and appointments. Our platform sends webhooks —real-time notifications—whenever important events occur. By subscribing to these webhooks, you can instantly update your own systems, trigger workflows, or keep your CRM in step with your customer interactions. Here’s a quick overview of the webhook types available: Full webhook documentation available in https://api.consolto.com/apidocs/webhook 📨 Chat & Feed Events FEED_EVENT – Notifies you whenever a new chat message is sent in a room. CALL_RECORDING – Alerts you when a call recording is available to download. FILE_UPLOAD / IMAGE_UPLOAD / AUDIO_MESSAGE – Triggered whenever participants share files, images, or audio messages. CONVERSATION_DIGEST – Sends a digest of all messages exchanged in a room (batched every 30 minutes). 📞 Call Events CALL_REQUEST – Fired when a customer initiates a call request. CALL_ACCEPT – Sent once an agent accepts the call. CALL_JOIN – Triggered as participants join an active call. CALL_END – Notifies you when a call session finishes. 👤 Customer & Contact Events CONTACT_FORM (NEW LEAD) – Delivers the full details whenever a user submits your Consolto widget’s contact form. CUSTOMER_EVENT – Updates you whenever customer profile or chat-room details (notes, tasks, etc.) change. 📅 Appointment & Scheduling Events NEW_MEETING_REQUEST – Sent when a new meeting is requested. CONFIRM_MEETING_REQUEST – Triggered when a proposed time slot is confirmed. UPDATE_MEETING_REQUEST – Fired when a meeting’s details (time, participants, notes) are updated. CANCEL_MEETING_REQUEST – Notifies you when a meeting is canceled. Why It Matters Webhooks allow you to: Sync conversations and appointments into your CRM or ticketing system. Trigger automations such as sending follow-up emails or notifications. Keep your analytics dashboards live and up-to-date. With Consolto webhooks, your business systems always know what’s happening—right when it happens. ‍ ‍ Settings and configuration: Webhooks can be sent by user or by skin (or both). For shared-team skins, use the setup in the skin's integrations. Setting up webhooks for a user: https://app.consolto.com/expertHome/settings/personalSettings/integrations Setting up for a skin: https://app.consolto.com/expertHome/settings/widgetSetup/setUpInstallation/integrations/integrationsAgent In order to connect Consolto's webhooks follow the following steps: Hit the "connect" button. Enter your webhook url and save. You can select the events that you'd like us to send We will start sending your webhook information. Security : in order for your servers to authenticate that the message was sent by Consolto, we send a authentication token along with the webhooks. Provide your URL and hit "Connect" ‍ Select webhook events Copy the auth-token and validate it with your servers ‍ ‍ ‍ Desktop and mobile apps www.consolto.com/knowledge-posts/ desktop-and-mobile-apps How To.
